title: Mark Haedicke
compiled_truth: Mark Haedicke is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-23), Mark Haedicke sent 1843 and received 1804 emails, totalling 3647 interactions. Top correspondents: [Janette Elbertson](people/janette-elbertson) (230), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (106), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (102), [Peter Keohane](people/peter-keohane) (88), [Jeffrey Hodge](people/jeffrey-hodge) (69). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, accomplishments, inbox, isda, sent.
